The Ultimate Gaming Platform for Community

Play. Earn. Build. Connect.

Ready to enter the Metacade? Start with a free tourist pass!

Explore Metacade for FREE

Access all areas with a tourist pass. Join now!

Get ready to Play, Earn, Build and Connect!

Empowering Gamers

Metacade unleashes a realm of rewarding experiences for gamers, fuelling their growth and recognizing their invaluable contributions.

Have Fun & Earn

Explore Metacade and participate in the latest earn opportunities from our Gaming Partners, be first to test their games, complete in game quests and explore their community.

Unlock Huge Rewards with a Digital Pass

Create your profile and make yourself available for the latest gigs, careers and incentives all dropped onto your Digital Pass

Fun & Challenging Gaming

Play the latest games from our Gaming Partners and enter tournaments to compete against the best gamers in Metacade. Oh and don't forget our play2earn games…!

About Us

Metacade is creating a unified platform for gamers, developers, and investors to build together. It's a win-win scenario where gamers get to enjoy playing fun games and actively contribute to their development, whilst at the same time can receive rewards, build their profile and find employment. Backed by a strong gaming community, and underpinned by an intuitive, engaging platform, Metacade helps players and developers do what they do best: build, play, earn, connect and most importantly have fun!
